data.title: Former SEC Chair Predicts Bitcoin's Longevity Due to Global Interest
data.description: According to BlockBeats, former U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) Chair Gary Gensler expressed in a video interview that Bitcoin is likely to endure for a long time. He attributed this potential longevity to the significant interest shown by the world's 7 billion people.

data.title: Binance’s second round of voting for listing tokens has ended, with FTT taking the largest share of votes
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Binance's second round of voting for coin listings ended at 7:59 today. The results showed that FTT ranked first with 11.1% of the votes, followed by ZEC and JASMY (both 8.6%), GPS (8.2%) and PDA (7.6%).

data.title: South Korea's central bank keeps rates unchanged amid rising tariff uncertainty
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News On April 17, the Bank of Korea kept interest rates unchanged at its April meeting, taking a widely expected breather as it considers how best to support an economy facing a severe blow from US tariffs. Twenty of the 25 economists surveyed before the rate decision predicted no rate changes in April, expecting the uncertainty caused by Trump's erratic trade statements to make policymakers at the Bank of Korea cautious. The central bank may also want more time to assess the impact of previous rate cuts before taking further action. As Asia's fourth-largest economy, South Korea relies on exports for nearly half of its GDP growth, making it vulnerable to trade disruptions brought about by the comprehensive tariffs recently announced by the United States. (Jinshi)

data.title: ETH whales restart operations, building a total of 4,520 ETH positions in 17 hours
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, the band whale address nemorino.eth started a new round of ETH position building operations after a week. In the past 17 hours, it bought a total of 4520.87 ETH at an average price of $1576, with a total position value of about 7.12 million US dollars. It has currently made a floating profit of about 40,000 US dollars. The most recent transaction occurred 9 hours ago. The address has accurately captured periodic fluctuations many times before.

data.title: A whale that has been dormant for two and a half years transferred about 1,161 ETH to Kraken
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @OnchainLens monitoring, a whale address transferred 1,161.77 ETH to Kraken after two and a half years of dormancy, which is about $1.84 million at the current price, with a cumulative profit of about $480,000. The address initially withdrew 943 ETH from Binance and exchanged $253,700 USDC for 146.59 stETH for staking, during which it received a total of 72 ETH as income.

data.title: Base officially issued two tokens on the Zora platform and later clarified that they were unofficial brand tokens.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News At 3:12 am on April 17th, Beijing time, Base officially released the "Base is for everyone" token on the Zora platform, and its market value once soared to 15 million US dollars. Then at 4:30, a second token called "Base @ FarCon 2025" was launched, causing the former's market value to fall to 1 million US dollars in a short period of time, and now it has rebounded to about 6.7 million US dollars.
Base officials subsequently issued a statement saying that this move is aimed at encouraging content to be put on the chain and promoting the development of on-chain culture, emphasizing that "Base has never sold these tokens, and these tokens are not official brand tokens of Base, Coinbase or any related products." Officials said that this is a public experiment and will continue to explore how cultural content can be expressed on the chain.
Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coins fluctuates greatly, so investors are advised to participate with caution.

data.title: North Carolina Bitcoin Reserve Bill Advances in Legislative Process
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the North Carolina Bitcoin Reserve Bill, HB 92, has been approved by the House Pensions and Retirement Committee. Before proceeding to a full vote, the bill must pass through three additional committees: Rules, Agenda, and House Operations.

data.title: New Scam Targets DeFi Users Through Abandoned Project Websites
data.description:
According to PANews, a new scam targeting DeFi users has emerged, where fraudsters take over the websites of abandoned projects to deceive former users into signing malicious 'fund-draining' transactions. Unlike traditional scams that actively target victims, this passive approach specifically aims at users who may still have bookmarks of old projects.

DeFiLlama's anonymous founder, 0xngmi, has issued a warning, stating that expired domains have been removed from their platform and browser extensions. However, users are advised to remain vigilant. As these project teams have disbanded, there is no one to promptly identify security vulnerabilities or replace malicious interfaces, leaving users with the responsibility to thoroughly verify each transaction they intend to sign.

A member of the Maker/Sky community highlighted that the official domain of the now-defunct Maker subDAO Sakura is currently available for sale at a nominal price. This situation underscores the importance of caution among DeFi users to prevent falling victim to such scams.

data.title: The U.S. SEC will hold the third crypto policy roundtable on April 25, focusing on crypto asset custody issues
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Eleanor Terrett, a crypto journalist, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) announced that it will hold the third crypto policy roundtable on April 25, focusing on the custody of crypto assets. The meeting will have two groups to discuss broker-dealers and wallet custody, and investment advisors and investment company custody.
Members of the broker-dealer group include Jason Allegrante of Fireblocks, Rachel Anderika of Anchorage, Terrence Dempsey of Fidelity, Mark Greenberg of Kraken, Veronica McGregor of Exodus, Brandon Russell of Etana Custody, and Tammy Weinrib of Copper.

data.title: DARK’s market value briefly exceeded 30 million US dollars, setting a new record high
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News shows that the market value of DARK has exceeded 30 million US dollars in a short period of time, and is now reported at 0.0252USDT, with a 24-hour increase of more than 60%. DARK is an experimental network based on a trusted execution environment (TEE) designed to support an infinitely scalable MCP world.
